PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-17-2005.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR PANOS LAGOS.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-15-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING: THE COURT GRANTED GUY WILSON, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT PHILIPPINES MICRONESIA & ORIENT NAVIGATION COMPANY CONTINGENT UPON AN ARBITRATOR BEING APPOINTED. COUNSEL MOVING TO BE RELIEVED IS DIRECTED TO SUBMIT A DECLARATION STATING THAT AN ARBITRATOR HAS BEEN APPONTED AND ATTACH A PROPOSED ORDER FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558.
ARBITRATOR MARK T LOBRE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-18-2005 THROUGH FEB-16-2006.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-21-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY RAIA, MARILYN
ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL

PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR WILSON, GUY ALLAN AS ATTORNEY FOR PHILIPPINES MICRONESIA & ORIENT NAVIGATION COMPANY A CORPORATION
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FORN MARK T. LOBRE

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-28-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. MAR-21-2006 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHILIPPINES MICRONESIA & ORIENT NAVIGATION COMPANY A CORPORATION $11,329.76 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,329.76, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF(S). SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-28-2006, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
